version_description: This Tab Is A Simplified Version Of The Song. There Honestly Isn't Much To The Song, Chord-wise, So... Yeah.

versions.version_description: Includes chords and synth melodies arranged for guitar.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Riff 1]

[tab]e|-----------------------------------------|
B|--6--6-----6--8--------------------------|
G|--------8--------5--8--------------------|
D|-----------------------------------------|
A|-----------------------------------------|
E|-----------------------------------------|[/tab]



[Intro]
N.C.
Yeah

[tab][Riff 2]
e|--13--13------13--15--------------13--13------13--15--------|
B|----------16----------13--16--------------16----------13--16|
G|------------------------------------------------------------|
D|------------------------------------------------------------|
A|------------------------------------------------------------|
E|------------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

[tab][Riff 2]
e|--18--15----------18--15------------------------------------|
B|----------18--16----------18--16--18------------------------|
G|------------------------------------------------------------|
D|------------------------------------------------------------|
A|------------------------------------------------------------|
E|------------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]                 [ch]Fm[/ch]
I've been tryna call[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I've been on my own for long enough[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Eb[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
Maybe you can show me how to love, maybe[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Fm[/ch]
I'm going through withdrawals[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm7[/ch]
You don't even have to do too much[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Eb[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
You can turn me on with just a touch, baby[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
I look around and
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                       [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Sin City's cold and empty (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Eb[/ch]
No one's around to judge me (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
I can't see clearly when you're gone[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm drowning in the night[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Eb[/ch]                                [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, when I'm like this, you're the one I trust[/tab]
N.C.
Hey, hey, hey

Repeat Riff 2

[Verse 2]
[tab]                    [ch]Fm[/ch]
I'm running out of time[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Cm7[/ch]
'Cause I can see the sun light up the sky[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
So I hit the road in overdrive, baby, oh[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                         [ch]Cm7[/ch]
The city's cold and empty (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]
No one's around to judge me (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
I can't see clearly when you're gone[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm drowning in the night[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Eb[/ch]                                [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, when I'm like this, you're the one I trust[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]                 [ch]Fm[/ch]
I'm just walking by to let you know (By to let you know)[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I can never say it on the phone (Say it on the phone)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Will never let you go this time (Ooh)[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]

N.C.
Hey, hey, hey
N.C.
Hey, hey, hey

(Repeat Riff 2)

[Outro]
